name: source-summarise
description: Summarise each source in an enriched notion-sources batch — a neutral digest, the author's overall position, the core arguments made, and an assessment of the reaction in the comments section — writing them into each source's front matter + a `## Core summary` section. Mechanical CLI + model-supplied JSON (the model reads each enriched body/comments and returns the summary). Standalone CLI: source-summarise.
